parameters.jsCode: const s = $('Seed Customer Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { chat_id: s.owner_chat_id, message: s.product_message, test_mode: true } }];

const r = $('Run Owner Item Preview').first().json || {}; const buttons = Array.isArray(r.buttons) ? r.buttons : []; const confirm = buttons.find((b) => String(b.id || '').startsWith('owner_inv_confirm__')); return [{ json: { ...( $('Seed Customer Inputs').first().json || {} ), owner_confirm_id: confirm ? String(confirm.id) : '' } }];
const d = $('Extract Owner Item Confirm').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { chat_id: d.owner_chat_id, button_id: d.owner_confirm_id, source_type: 'button', test_mode: true } }];
const s = $('Seed Customer Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.empty_chat_id, address: s.address } } }];
const s = $('Seed Customer Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.empty_chat_id, test_mode: true } } }];
const s = $('Seed Customer Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.customer_chat_id, product_name: s.product_name, quantity: 2 } } }];
const s = $('Seed Customer Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.customer_chat_id } } }];
const s = $('Seed Customer Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.customer_chat_id, address: s.address } } }];

const r = $('Run Customer Place').first().json || {}; const buttons = Array.isArray(r.buttons) ? r.buttons : []; const confirm = buttons.find((b) => String(b.id || '') === 'confirm_order'); return [{ json: { ...( $('Seed Customer Inputs').first().json || {} ), confirm_button_id: confirm ? String(confirm.id) : '' } }];
const s = $('Seed Customer Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.customer_chat_id, test_mode: true } } }];
const s = $('Seed Customer Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.customer_chat_id, order_id: '' } } }];
const s = $('Seed Customer Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.cancel_chat_id, product_name: s.product_name, quantity: 1 } } }];
const s = $('Seed Customer Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.cancel_chat_id, address: s.address } } }];
const s = $('Seed Customer Inputs').first().json; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.cancel_chat_id } } }];

parameters.query: ={{ (() => { const s = $('Seed Customer Inputs').first().json || {}; const customer = String(s.customer_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const cancel = String(s.cancel_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const empty = String(s.empty_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const tag = String(s.tag || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); return `SELECT 'order_summary' AS kind, COUNT(*)::text AS value FROM public.order_summary WHERE chat_id = ${customer} UNION ALL SELECT 'orders' AS kind, COUNT(*)::text AS value FROM public.orders WHERE user_id = ${customer} UNION ALL SELECT 'cancel_pending' AS kind, COUNT(*)::text AS value FROM public.pending_orders WHERE chat_id = ${cancel} AND status IN ('awaiting_confirmation','processing') UNION ALL SELECT 'active_cart_customer' AS kind, COUNT(*)::text AS value FROM public.carts WHERE user_id = ${customer} AND status = 'active' UNION ALL SELECT 'active_cart_cancel' AS kind, COUNT(*)::text AS value FROM public.carts WHERE user_id = ${cancel} AND status = 'active' UNION ALL SELECT 'inventory_rows' AS kind, COUNT(*)::text AS value FROM public.inventory WHERE item_name ILIKE '%' || '${tag}' || '%' UNION ALL SELECT 'pending_empty' AS kind, COUNT(*)::text AS value FROM public.pending_orders WHERE chat_id = ${empty};`; })() }}

={{ (() => { const s = $('Seed Customer Inputs').first().json || {}; const customer = String(s.customer_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const cancel = String(s.cancel_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const empty = String(s.empty_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const tag = String(s.tag || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); return `DELETE FROM public.pending_orders WHERE chat_id IN (${customer}, ${cancel}, ${empty}); DELETE FROM public.order_feedback WHERE chat_id::text IN ('${customer}', '${cancel}', '${empty}'); DELETE FROM public.orders WHERE user_id IN (${customer}, ${cancel}, ${empty}); DELETE FROM public.order_summary WHERE chat_id IN (${customer}, ${cancel}, ${empty}); DELETE FROM public.cart_items WHERE cart_id IN (SELECT cart_id FROM public.carts WHERE user_id IN (${customer}, ${cancel}, ${empty})); DELETE FROM public.carts WHERE user_id IN (${customer}, ${cancel}, ${empty}); DELETE FROM public.inventory WHERE item_name ILIKE '%' || '${tag}' || '%'; SELECT 'cleanup' AS result;`; })() }}
